title: thelypteris dura
intro: Thelypteris dura, also known as the Duran fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris dura include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
